content.en:
Seeing that Ye Tian had come out, Junshan Great Ancestor directly grabbed Ye Tian.

If he can capture Ye Tian, let Ye Tian take the initiative to hand over the treasure, and then take the initiative to sacrifice the ruin stone tower, then he can obtain the complete ruin stone tower.

When the time comes, Tongshan City will also be able to have a ruin, which is a huge opportunity!

However, just as he hit Ye Tian with one blow, the power of the Golden God Armor Stone on Ye Tian's body exploded, blocking his attack completely.

Although there was still residual attack power, it was also blocked by Ye Tian's other defensive means, so it didn't hurt Ye Tian at all.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian's truncated finger erupted, and a blow also hit Junshan Great Ancestor, directly knocking Junshan Great Ancestor away, and a drop of immeasurable blood flowed out of Junshan Great Ancestor's body.

Junshan Dazu is injured!

Seeing this scene, the surrounding Great Ancestors were shocked.

"Golden God Armor Stone !!!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor was slightly surprised.

The Golden God Armor Stone is of great help to a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform like him, and if he obtains a Golden God Armor Stone, his combat power will definitely skyrocket.

"Strange, there has never been a Golden God Armor Stone left in the Divine Armor Realm, how could the Ruins Stone Tower ingest the Golden God Armor Stone?"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor was puzzled.

A treasure like the Golden God Armor Stone, once it is born, cannot be hidden at all, and it will definitely be discovered.

The territory of the Divine Armor Realm that intersects with the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss has never given birth to the Golden Divine Armor Stone, he is sure of it, and where did Ye Tian get the Golden Divine Armor Stone!

"Golden God Armor Stone !!"

Junshan Ancestor was also moved.

If he captures Ye Tian, he will also be able to obtain the Golden God Armor Stone on Ye Tian's body, and his strength will skyrocket at that time.

"Kill!"

Junshan Great Ancestor went crazy and began to burn his own immeasurable blood and engage in extreme battles.

"Burn immeasurable blood, and so will I!"

Ye Tianjiang's body burned and exploded with drops of immeasurable blood, although this move would hurt the foundation and would take a long time to recover, but he could replace the copy body at any time, so this kind of explosion had no effect on him.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian fought with all his might, not only burning immeasurable blood, but Taihao's immeasurable body also burst out, and every blow he hit could shake the time and space of the Xuanqi Realm.

Time and space continued to shatter, and the entire Nine Shadows Blood Abyss was shattering, as if it couldn't withstand their impact.

The invisible light was transmitted to the entire Nine Shadows Blood Abyss, causing many of the original creatures in the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss to explode and die one by one, and the onlookers also quickly retreated, so as not to be affected.

Soon, Junshan Dazu's injuries were not light.

After all, he didn't have the Golden God Armor Stone Defensive Armor, so he couldn't protect himself from being injured, and he was also desperate, burning immeasurable blood, so his injuries became more and more serious.

Even the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage could not fight like this for a long time.

......

"Junshan Great Ancestor has actually fallen into disadvantage!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor was a little surprised.

It was incredible that a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform would be able to fight and have an advantage over a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform like Junshan Great Ancestor!

Under normal circumstances, even if a high-level immeasurable lifeform on the immeasurable blood list encounters a high-level immeasurable lifeform in the fourth stage, it is almost a situation where it is easily hit or even killed in seconds.

It's really too big a gap between the third stage and the fourth stage!

But he also knew very well why Ye Tian was so terrifying.

"A Mahayana immeasurable body, and it has definitely cultivated to the realm of Dacheng, and the immeasurable bone and immeasurable blood have been tempered to the limit, and they also master the powerful immeasurable extreme domain technique, and their own foundation is also unimaginably strong, at the beginning of the intermediate immeasurable life body realm, life recasting has definitely reached more than a dozen times!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor reasoned.

Such a high-level immeasurable lifeform can't be cultivated even if the Xuanxin Great Ancestor tries his best!

One is the problem of resource scarcity, and the other is the problem of potential talent, it does not mean that if you have resources, you can cultivate an ordinary Great Ancestor to this extent, without enough potential, no matter how many resources you have, it is useless.

"If I retreat and continue to fight, your and mine's foundations will be permanently damaged!"

Junshan Ancestor was in a hurry.

Although burning immeasurable blood would damage the foundation, with his cultivation strength, he could still repair the damage if it took a long time, and compared to the benefits obtained, this loss was naturally not worth mentioning.

But the premise is that he captures Ye Tian and obtains treasures such as the Ruins Stone Tower and the Golden God Armor Stone.

Now, he had no hope of capturing Ye Tian at all, so he naturally didn't want to continue fighting.

If you continue to fight, the foundation will be permanently lost, and you may not even be able to go further.

For such a loss, he could not afford it.

However, he wanted to withdraw, but Ye Tian intercepted him again and again, and didn't let him leave at all.

After a while, Junshan Great Ancestor was completely panicked, now he has injured the origin, it will permanently hurt the foundation, and if it is delayed for a long time, the permanent loss of the foundation will be serious.

But if he didn't continue to burn immeasurable blood, his combat power would drop instantly, and his injuries would be more serious, which was almost an unsolvable problem.

"You can't go crazy, you will also lose your foundation forever, you are so demonic, the third stage can be compared to the fourth stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeforms, the potential is unlimited, you have to die with me!"

Junshan Great Ancestor roared angrily.

He was really puzzled, didn't Ye Tian ruin himself like this?

Distance.

Xuanxin Great Ancestor and other high-level immeasurable lifeforms were also dumbfounded, they didn't understand why Ye Tian was so crazy, burning immeasurable blood to fight until now, and the foundation was damaged!

If you continue like this, there is no hope of breaking through to become a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform!

"It's a pity, this Great Ancestor with unlimited potential is afraid that he will stop at the third stage, and no matter how powerful the treasure is, he will not be able to restore his foundation!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor regretted it, but he was very happy in his heart.

After all, such a great ancestor is not the great ancestor of Xuanqi Pavilion, so he doesn't want Ye Tian to rise, Ye Tian hurts the foundation like this and destroys his potential, he is happy to see it.

Soon, Ye Tian and Junshan Great Ancestor fought to the point of complete madness, the immeasurable blood was almost exhausted, and the combat effectiveness declined.

Although Ye Tian had the Golden God Armor Stone to protect his body, and his physical body was not damaged, the burning of immeasurable blood was real, so the foundation was seriously damaged.

But Junshan Great Ancestor was the most miserable, not only was his immeasurable blood almost exhausted, but his flesh and blood body was also full of holes, difficult to repair, and his body was almost destroyed.

"Spare your life!"

Junshan Ancestor begged for mercy.

His fourth-stage realm was already unstable, he would fall to the realm at any time, and he would never recover, which was no different from killing him for him.

But what he didn't know was that Ye Tian was so crazy to deter other forces, otherwise a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform would invade and attack his ruin stone tower, and he would not be able to completely protect the ruin stone tower.

Only madness is enough to make the other Great Ancestors stop.

"Final blow!"

Ye Tian urged the seed power of the Infinite Divine Power Technique in the depths of the Infinite Bone, although he could not perform the Infinite Divine Power Technique, but he could still do it by stimulating the power of the Infinite Divine Power Seed.

It's just that forcibly activating this power is very damaging to the physical body.

But his replica body has already suffered a serious loss, and he is ready to replace it, so he naturally doesn't care about continuing to squeeze this replica body.

"Kill!"

A silvery-white light erupted from Ye Tian's immeasurable bones and turned into a sword light.

This sword may seem small, but it contains terrifying power.

When Junshan Ancestor and Xuanxin Ancestor saw this sword, their pupils shrank, as if they had seen something incredible.

Especially the Great Ancestor of Junshan, at this moment, he was even more trembling, and his fear was to the limit.

However, he didn't have a chance to speak, or even do anything else, because this sword ray surpassed the space-time limit speed of the Genki Realm, beyond his reaction.
